panels.title: ${stock} — mid prices: Lighter (perp) vs Gate (perp) vs Pyth (oracle)
panels.description: Direct mid-price comparison. When market is closed/halted, divergences indicate which venue is leading the others.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "lighter" FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN (concat('${stock}','_USDT'), concat('${stock}','X_USDT')) AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pyth" FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${stock} — cross-venue divergence (bp). Positive = Lighter higher than other.
panels.description: Lighter-Gate, Lighter-Pyth, Gate-Pyth in basis points. Sustained non-zero values reveal lead-lag structure.

targets.rawSql: WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), g AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN (concat('${stock}','_USDT'), concat('${stock}','X_USDT')) AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT l.timestamp time, (l.mid - g.mid)/g.mid*10000 "Lighter-Gate" FROM l ASOF JOIN g ORDER BY l.timestamp

WITH l AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT l.timestamp time, (l.mid - p.mid)/p.mid*10000 "Lighter-Pyth" FROM l ASOF JOIN p ORDER BY l.timestamp

WITH g AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN (concat('${stock}','_USDT'), concat('${stock}','X_USDT')) AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())), p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol='${stock}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-15,now())) SELECT g.timestamp time, (g.mid - p.mid)/p.mid*10000 "Gate-Pyth" FROM g ASOF JOIN p ORDER BY g.timestamp

panels.title: All stocks — latest snapshot (Lighter / Gate / Pyth + bp divergence)
panels.description: Live cross-venue snapshot. Sort by |L-P bp| or |L-G bp| to find biggest current divergences.

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-2,now()) GROUP BY symbol), gt AS (SELECT replace(replace(symbol,'_USDT',''),'X','') sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDAX_USDT','TSLAX_USDT','AAPLX_USDT','AMZNX_USDT','MSFT_USDT','METAX_USDT','GOOGLX_USDT','AMD_USDT','MU_USDT','INTC_USDT','SPYX_USDT','QQQX_USDT','ORCLX_USDT','ASML_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-2,now()) GROUP BY symbol), py AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) GROUP BY symbol) SELECT lh.sym, round(lh.px,2) lighter, round(gt.px,2) gate, round(py.px,2) pyth, round((lh.px-gt.px)/gt.px*10000,1) LG_bp, round((lh.px-py.px)/py.px*10000,1) LP_bp, round((gt.px-py.px)/py.px*10000,1) GP_bp, round(abs((lh.px-py.px)/py.px*10000),1) abs_LP_bp FROM lh LEFT JOIN gt ON lh.sym=gt.sym LEFT JOIN py ON lh.sym=py.sym ORDER BY abs_LP_bp DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Top |Lighter-Gate| divergence right now (across all stocks)
panels.description: Both Lighter and Gate have stock perps. Same instrument on two perp DEXes — should converge. Wide gaps = arbitrage candidates.

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) GROUP BY symbol), gt AS (SELECT replace(replace(symbol,'_USDT',''),'X','') sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDAX_USDT','TSLAX_USDT','AAPLX_USDT','AMZNX_USDT','MSFT_USDT','METAX_USDT','GOOGLX_USDT','AMD_USDT','MU_USDT','INTC_USDT','SPYX_USDT','QQQX_USDT','ORCLX_USDT','ASML_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) GROUP BY symbol) SELECT lh.sym, round(lh.px,2) lighter, round(gt.px,2) gate, round((lh.px-gt.px)/gt.px*10000,2) bp_dev, round(abs((lh.px-gt.px)/gt.px*10000),2) abs_bp FROM lh JOIN gt ON lh.sym=gt.sym ORDER BY abs_bp DESC

panels.title: Top |Lighter-Pyth| divergence right now
panels.description: Pyth as oracle reference. Large positive Lighter-Pyth = Lighter quotes above Pyth's aggregate price.

targets.rawSql: WITH lh AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL','AVGO') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) GROUP BY symbol), py AS (SELECT symbol sym, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) px FROM pyth_bookticker WHERE symbol IN ('NVDA','TSLA','AAPL','AMZN','MSFT','META','GOOGL','AMD','MU','INTC','SPY','QQQ','ORCL','ASML','SNDK','MRVL','AVGO') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) GROUP BY symbol) SELECT lh.sym, round(lh.px,2) lighter, round(py.px,2) pyth, round((lh.px-py.px)/py.px*10000,2) bp_dev, round(abs((lh.px-py.px)/py.px*10000),2) abs_bp FROM lh JOIN py ON lh.sym=py.sym ORDER BY abs_bp DESC
